preserved_interpretation: Fork's own experiment should be governed by Fork's claim-boundary discipline.
Classification must remain independently rerunnable from preserved raw outputs.
Optimization eligibility should be mechanically bounded.
recommendations: Define a normative hierarchy from protocol through synthesis.
Preserve separate receiver-run, classification-run, and method identifiers.
Classify amendments by their effect on baseline validity.
Do not overwrite original classifications or interpretations.
Require independent recomputation before optimized variants are admitted.
